name: e2e-mobile-tests
description: End-to-end mobile automation tests for PearPass (Android & iOS, BrowserStack & local)

scripts.test:onboarding: cross-env PLATFORM=Android RUN_TARGET=local_emulator ENABLE_QASE=false ENABLE_SLACK=false npm run wdio -- --suite onboarding
scripts.test:signup: cross-env PLATFORM=Android RUN_TARGET=local_emulator ENABLE_QASE=false ENABLE_SLACK=false npm run wdio -- --suite signup
scripts.test:settings: cross-env PLATFORM=Android RUN_TARGET=local_emulator ENABLE_QASE=false ENABLE_SLACK=false npm run wdio -- --suite settings
scripts.test:home: cross-env PLATFORM=Android RUN_TARGET=local_emulator ENABLE_QASE=false ENABLE_SLACK=false npm run wdio -- --suite home
scripts.test:create-login-item: cross-env PLATFORM=Android RUN_TARGET=local_emulator ENABLE_QASE=false ENABLE_SLACK=false npm run wdio -- --suite createLoginItem
scripts.test:all: cross-env PLATFORM=Android RUN_TARGET=local_emulator ENABLE_QASE=false ENABLE_SLACK=false npm run wdio -- --suite all
